sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Scholastic Q3 2026 Financial Strategy & Capital Return to Shareholders - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Scholastic Corporation's President and CEO, Peter Warwick, detailed the company's Q3 2026 financial strategy, which focused on long-term growth and shareholder value. A key initiative was the completion of a sale-leaseback transaction for its headquarters and a distribution facility, generating over $400 million in net proceeds. Following this, Scholastic nearly fully utilized a $150 million share repurchase authorization to return capital to shareholders, viewing its shares as a highly accretive investment.

feed.title: SRB Corp sells $87,599 in Safety Insurance Group (SAFT) shares
feed.summary: SRB Corp, a ten percent owner of Safety Insurance Group (SAFT), sold 1,199 shares for $87,599 on March 17, 2026. Following the transaction, SRB Corp and Plymouth Rock Co Inc jointly own 1,808,806 shares. Safety Insurance Group recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.92 per share and plans to release its Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results on February 25, 2026.

feed.title: RTH Stock Fund Price and Chart — NASDAQ:RTH
feed.summary: The VanEck Retail ETF (RTH) provides a focused investment in US retail giants, tracking the MVIS US Listed Retail 25 index. The article details RTH's key statistics—including an AUM of $253.31 million, a 0.97% dividend yield, and a 0.35% expense ratio—along with its price performance, fund composition, and technical analysis. It also answers frequently asked questions about ETFs, RTH's performance, and investment details.

feed.title: Revolution Medicines (RVMD) COO pre-planned sale tied to RSU tax
feed.summary: Revolution Medicines, Inc. (RVMD) COO Margaret A. Horn reported selling 4,583 shares of common stock at $99.4804 per share. This transaction was pre-planned under a Rule 10b5-1 instruction letter to cover tax withholding obligations associated with the vesting of restricted stock units (RSUs). After the sale, Horn directly holds 157,570 shares and also retains 73,050 RSUs.

feed.title: Range Resources director Dorman sells $542k in stock
feed.summary: Range Resources director Margaret K. Dorman sold 12,500 shares of common stock for over $542,000 across March 17 and 18, 2026, as the stock traded near its 52-week high. Following these transactions, Dorman directly holds 113,858 shares. The company recently reported strong Q4 2025 financial results, increased its dividend, and received a raised price target from TD Cowen.

feed.title: Insider Buying: Rolf Stangl Acquires Shares of Reynolds Consumer Products Inc (REYN)
feed.summary: Rolf Stangl, a Director at Reynolds Consumer Products Inc (REYN), recently purchased 4,705 shares, increasing his total holdings to 39,537 shares. This transaction is part of a trend of 8 insider buys and no insider sells over the past year, indicating positive insider sentiment. The stock is considered modestly undervalued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.8, trading at $21.06 with a market cap of $4.39 billion and a P/E ratio of 14.49.

feed.title: RGNX Investors Have Opportunity to Lead REGENXBIO, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is reminding investors who purchased REGENXBIO, Inc. (NASDAQ: RGNX) securities between February 9, 2022, and January 27, 2026, of the April 14, 2026, lead plaintiff deadline for a securities fraud lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that REGENXBIO made false and misleading statements regarding the efficacy and safety of its RGX-111 gene therapy trial for Hurler syndrome. Investors who suffered damages may be entitled to compensation through a class action.

feed.title: Japan Post Holdings sells AFLAC shares worth $1.72 million
feed.summary: Japan Post Holdings Co., Ltd. sold 15,700 shares of AFLAC INC (NYSE:AFL) common stock on March 17, 2026, for a total of $1.72 million, at an average price of $109.77 per share. Following this transaction, Japan Post Holdings retains 52,100,900 shares of AFLAC. The article also mentions Aflac's recent Q4 2025 earnings, which missed EPS forecasts but exceeded revenue, and a revised price target by Mizuho.

feed.title: Park Avenue Securities LLC Increases Position in RTX Corporation $RTX
feed.summary: Park Avenue Securities LLC increased its stake in RTX Corporation by 11.1% in Q4 2025, now owning 83,631 shares valued at $15.34 million. This comes amidst mixed market signals for RTX, including potential benefits from increased defense spending due to geopolitical tensions and an Airbus dispute that could lead to significant legal/contract risk. Insiders, however, have been net sellers of RTX stock, offloading shares worth over $18 million in the past three months.

feed.title: Park Avenue Securities LLC Has $24.58 Million Position in Cisco Systems, Inc. $CSCO

Cisco recently exceeded quarterly earnings expectations, reporting an EPS of $1.04 and revenue of $15.35 billion, with analysts maintaining a "Moderate Buy" rating and an average price target of $89.55. Despite recent insider selling, including by the CEO, Cisco has also raised its quarterly dividend to $0.42 per share, reflecting a 2.1% yield.

feed.title: GoalVest Advisory LLC Sells 20,753 Shares of Cisco Systems, Inc. $CSCO
feed.summary: GoalVest Advisory LLC has reduced its stake in Cisco Systems by 42.0%, selling 20,753 shares and leaving them with 28,654 shares valued at $2.207 million. This comes as Cisco beat earnings expectations and increased its dividend, although notable insider selling, including shares offloaded by CEO Charles Robbins and EVP Oliver Tuszik, could influence market sentiment. Despite some insider selling and valuation concerns, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for Cisco.

feed.title: Park Avenue Securities LLC Has $14.77 Million Stake in Caterpillar Inc. $CAT
feed.summary: Park Avenue Securities LLC increased its stake in Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) by 18.1% in Q4, reaching 25,788 shares valued at approximately $14.77 million. Caterpillar reported strong Q4 results, surpassing earnings and revenue expectations,

feed.title: Park Avenue Securities LLC Acquires 223,177 Shares of Netflix, Inc. $NFLX
feed.summary: Park Avenue Securities LLC significantly increased its holdings in Netflix (NASDAQ:NFLX) by 915.1% in Q4, acquiring an additional 223,177 shares to reach a total of 247,565 shares valued at approximately $23.21 million. This increase occurred despite Netflix shares being down about 3.1% and substantial insider selling totaling $137.26 million in the last quarter. Analysts currently rate Netflix as a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $114.35, though mixed signals regarding subscriber growth and content spending raise concerns.

feed.title: Park Avenue Securities LLC Raises Position in Arista Networks, Inc. $ANET
feed.summary: Park Avenue Securities LLC increased its stake in Arista Networks (ANET) by 10.1% in Q4, with other major institutions also holding significant positions, leading to 82.47% institutional ownership. Arista reported strong Q4 earnings, beating estimates, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with raised price targets. Despite some insider selling indicative of profit-taking, the overall institutional accumulation and positive sentiment driven by AI/data center narrative suggest continued strength for the stock.

feed.title: News Corp (Nasdaq: NWS) updates $1B stock buy-back program
feed.summary: News Corp (Nasdaq: NWS) has provided an update on its $1 billion stock repurchase program, initially authorized in 2025. The company is buying back Nasdaq-listed Class A and Class B common stock through Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC, and recent disclosures show repurchases totaling over $125 million at prices between $22.20 and $31.40. The program aims to enhance shareholder value and does not include ASX-listed CDIs.

feed.title: [Form 4] Sea Ltd Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Sea Ltd's chief compliance officer and general counsel, Wang Yanjun, reported open-market sales of 1,600 Class A ordinary shares between March 18-19, 2026, through a BVI entity he controls. The sales were executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan at weighted average prices ranging from $79.98 to $86.52. Despite these transactions, the sales represent a small fraction of his overall holdings, with the BVI entity retaining 36,400 shares and Wang directly holding 1,220,976 shares.

feed.title: GoalVest Advisory LLC Has $1.14 Million Stake in DTE Energy Company $DTE

This comes after DTE Energy reported strong Q4 results, beating EPS estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend. Analyst sentiment toward DTE Energy is mixed but leans positive, with a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average target price of $152.46.

feed.title: Legacy Wealth Management LLC MS Raises Stock Holdings in RTX Corporation $RTX

feed.title: Miller Global Investments LLC Purchases New Position in ONEOK, Inc. $OKE

feed.title: GoalVest Advisory LLC Increases Stake in Bank of America Corporation $BAC
feed.summary: GoalVest Advisory LLC significantly increased its stake in Bank of America (NYSE:BAC) by 780% in the fourth quarter of 2025, acquiring an additional 19,563 shares to hold a total of 22,071 shares valued at approximately $1.21 million. Despite these institutional buys, company insiders have been net sellers, offloading 227,832 shares worth about $11.09 million in the last 90 days.

feed.title: Miller Global Investments LLC Makes New $1.15 Million Investment in Verizon Communications Inc. $VZ
feed.summary: Miller Global Investments LLC initiated a new position in Verizon Communications (VZ) during Q4, purchasing 28,218 shares valued at approximately $1.15 million, making it their 22nd largest holding. Verizon recently raised its quarterly dividend to $0.7075, offering a 5.7% yield, and has received several analyst upgrades with a consensus target price of $50.03. The company also reported a slight earnings and revenue beat for the quarter and provided positive FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: Miller Global Investments LLC Purchases Shares of 54,023 AT&T Inc. $T
feed.summary: Miller Global Investments LLC initiated a new position in AT&T Inc. (NYSE:T) by purchasing 54,023 shares valued at approximately $1.342 million, making it its 17th largest holding. AT&T recently surpassed Q4 earnings expectations, reporting an EPS of $0.52 against an estimate of $0.46, with revenues reaching $33.47 billion. Despite positive news like a new AI-driven customer app, the company faces near-term challenges from industry discounting and mixed analyst revisions.

feed.title: Argus Adjusts Price Target on Williams-Sonoma to $225 From $212, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Argus has raised its price target for Williams-Sonoma (WSM) shares to $225 from $212, while reaffirming a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes after other analysts like UBS, RBC, Barclays, Evercore ISI, Baird, Loop Capital, BNP Paribas, Goldman Sachs, TD Cowen, Gordon Haskett, and Jefferies also recently updated their price targets for the company. Williams-Sonoma specializes in furniture and home furnishings, operating through a network of stores and online platforms across multiple countries.

feed.title: Oracle Q3 2026 Earnings: Revenue Up 22%, Cloud Grows 84%, Stock Rises - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Oracle's stock surged 9% after its strong fiscal Q3 2026 earnings report, with quarterly revenue increasing 22% year-over-year to $17.2 billion and non-GAAP earnings growing 21% to $1.79 per share. The company's cloud infrastructure business saw an 84% revenue increase, and its remaining performance obligations (RPO) jumped 325% to $553 billion, indicating a robust future revenue pipeline driven by AI workloads. Oracle is successfully expanding its data center infrastructure using a bring-your-own-hardware model.

feed.title: Legacy Wealth Management LLC MS Has $2.94 Million Stake in UnitedHealth Group Incorporated $UNH
feed.summary: Legacy Wealth Management LLC MS reduced its stake in UnitedHealth Group (UNH) by 30.8% in Q4, now holding 8,910 shares valued at approximately $2.94 million. Despite the reduction by this firm, UnitedHealth Group beat Q4 earnings estimates, reported strong revenue growth, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $372.13. The company also offers a quarterly dividend of $2.21, resulting in an annualized yield of 3.2%.

feed.title: NextEra Energy, Inc. $NEE Stock Holdings Lifted by GoalVest Advisory LLC
feed.summary: GoalVest Advisory LLC significantly increased its stake in NextEra Energy (NEE) by 221.6% in Q4, holding 17,829 shares valued at $1.43 million, part of a broader trend of institutional buying. NextEra Energy reported Q4 EPS of $0.54, beating estimates, but missed revenue projections at $6.50 billion, though revenue was up 20.7% year-over-year. The company also raised its quarterly dividend to $0.6232 per share, and analysts maintain a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price of $94.44.

feed.title: Foguth Wealth Management LLC. Makes New $690,000 Investment in International Business Machines Corporation $IBM

The company recently beat quarterly EPS estimates, recorded 12.2% YoY revenue growth, and pays a $1.68 quarterly dividend. Despite some analysts trimming price targets post-Confluent deal, IBM's strategic moves in AI and positive market sentiment continue to support investor interest, though recent returns show mixed momentum.

feed.title: Foguth Wealth Management LLC. Makes New Investment in Waste Management, Inc. $WM
feed.summary: Foguth Wealth Management LLC has acquired a new stake of 4,793 shares in Waste Management (NYSE:WM), valued at approximately $1.047 million. This move is amidst positive Wall Street sentiment, with a "Moderate Buy" consensus and a $254.59 price target, although insiders collectively sold shares worth about $23.04 million in the last quarter. Waste Management also increased its quarterly dividend to $0.945 per share, yielding 1.6% annually.

feed.title: Dollar General 2025 10-K: $42.7B Revenue, $6.85 EPS
feed.summary: Dollar General reported strong financial results for fiscal year 2025, with net sales reaching $42.7 billion and diluted earnings per share at $6.85. The company's gross profit increased to $13.1 billion, driven by lower shrink and higher markups, while net income saw a substantial 34.4% rise. These gains were supported by operational initiatives including store remodels, expanded digital channels, and improved inventory management.

feed.title: 3M Ventures: CVC funds are crucial for companies at times of disruption
feed.summary: Ben Wright, head of 3M Ventures, emphasizes that corporate venture capital (CVC) units are more vital than ever during periods of disruption and economic uncertainty. He argues that rather than retrenching, companies should lean into venture investing to stay ahead, especially as multiple industries are being reshaped. 3M Ventures is focusing on data centers and aerospace, areas where material science innovations are critical for advancing technologies like AI infrastructure and next-generation aircraft.

feed.title: Is Revvity Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
feed.summary: Revvity Inc. (RVTY), a global life sciences and diagnostics company with a $9.5 billion market cap, has shown mixed performance compared to the S&P 500. While its stock gained 10.9% in the past three months, outperforming the S&P 500's 3.3% fall, it has underperformed over longer periods, dipping 22% over 52 weeks versus the S&P 500's 16.4% return. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a potential upside of 39.2%.

feed.title: Sea Ltd (SE) COO Ye Gang sells 20,000 shares via 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Sea Ltd's COO, Ye Gang, reported pre-planned insider sales of 20,000 Class A ordinary shares through a BVI entity he controls. These sales were executed under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted in September 2025 at prices ranging from $81.72 to $86.50 per share. Despite these transactions, the sales represent a small fraction of his overall reported holdings, with 70,000 indirect shares remaining and 22,794,539 direct shares.

feed.title: A Look At Booking Holdings (BKNG) Valuation As Long Term Returns Contrast With Recent Share Price Moves
feed.summary: Booking Holdings (BKNG) is currently trading at US$4,294, significantly below its estimated fair value of $5,465, indicating it is undervalued by 21.4%. While short-term share price performance has been mixed, the company has delivered strong long-term returns over three and five years. The valuation is based on its long-term platform strength and capacity to monetize evolving travel behavior, despite its P/E ratio being higher than the US Hospitality average but below peers.

feed.title: QYLG ETF Analysis: Dividends, Returns NASDAQ:QYLG

It covers key statistics such as AUM, expense ratio, dividend yield, and its strategy of providing Nasdaq-100 exposure while generating income through covered calls. feed.title: AdvisorShares Psychedelics ETF Review and Aggregate Rating (PSIL) $PSIL
feed.summary: The AdvisorShares Psychedelics ETF (PSIL) currently holds an aggregate "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $16.47, based on 179 analyst ratings covering 19 portfolio companies. The ETF's holdings show a mix of ratings, with the largest weighting in Atai Beckley and Definium Therapeutics. This analysis provides an overview of how MarketBeat aggregates ETF ratings and lists detailed ratings and potential upsides for the top holdings within the PSIL ETF.

feed.title: Parsons Corp. Stock Plummets to New 52-Week Low of $51.08
feed.summary: Parsons Corp. has reached a new 52-week low of $51.08, with its stock declining by 32.12% over the past year. Despite this drop, the company maintains a solid market capitalization of $7,603 million, a low debt-to-equity ratio of 0.31, and a positive return on equity of 11.69%. The stock is trading at a fair value relative to its peers.

feed.title: Parsons gets 2 more option years on classified U.S. contract
feed.summary: Parsons (NYSE: PSN) announced a classified contract award worth over $47 million for continued work with the U.S. government. This extension builds on a task the company has performed for more than six years and includes two additional one-year option periods. The classified nature of the work limits public disclosure but provides near-term revenue visibility, complementing other recent contract wins.

feed.title: Wisconsin regulators approve two new solar projects for $360 million
feed.summary: Wisconsin utility regulators have approved We Energies' purchase of two new solar projects, Good Oak and Gristmill, in Columbia County. These projects, costing $360 million, will generate 165 megawatts and could primarily power large data centers, including those for Microsoft and Vantage. This initiative aligns with WEC Energy Group's goal of achieving net-zero carbon emissions by 2050.

feed.title: JPMorgan Adjusts Price Target on Ventas to $93 From $88, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: JPMorgan has raised its price target on Ventas (VTR) shares to $93 from $88, while reiterating an Overweight rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook by the financial institution on the healthcare real estate investment trust. Other analysts have also recently updated their price targets for Ventas, mostly upwards, with ratings ranging from Outperform to Buy.

feed.title: NSA (NSA) explains vesting, prorated FY2026 bonus and severance in merger with Public Storage
feed.summary: National Storage Affiliates Trust (NSA) has detailed the employee compensation, vesting, and severance implications of its proposed merger with Public Storage. Equity awards not already vested will accelerate and convert into common shares for merger consideration, with 2026 performance-based Partnership LTIP Units being cancelled without payment. Eligible corporate employees will receive a prorated FY2026 bonus, and a new severance plan has been established, treating the merger as a change in control with specified formulas for corporate and field participants.

feed.title: Sea Ltd (NYSE: SE) CPO logs 1,600-share Rule 10b5-1 sale
feed.summary: Sea Ltd's Chief Product Officer for Shopee, Chen Jingye, indirectly sold 1,600 Class A ordinary shares through a BVI entity between March 18-19, 2026. The sales were executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted in August 2025, with prices ranging from $79.98 to $86.52. These transactions represent a small portion of his total holdings, which include 239,200 indirect shares and over 9 million direct shares.

feed.title: Is Stanley Black & Decker Stock Underperforming the Dow?
feed.summary: Stanley Black & Decker (SWK) is a large-cap industrial and consumer tools manufacturer but has been underperforming the Dow Jones Industrial Average. While experts rate the stock as a "Moderate Buy" with significant upside potential, its recent stock performance shows declines across three-month, six-month, and 52-week periods, contrasting with its rival Snap-on's gains. The company recently announced a cash dividend, signaling confidence in its financial stability.

feed.title: Pre-planned Sea (NYSE: SE) insider sale offloads about 72K shares
feed.summary: A director-linked entity of Sea Ltd (NYSE: SE), associated with David Y. Ma, sold 72,435 Class A ordinary shares in open-market transactions on March 18, 2026. These sales, executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan, happened at weighted average prices of $85.28 and $86.14. Following the transactions, Ma indirectly holds 1,453,392 shares through the BVI entity and directly holds 10,000 shares.

feed.title: Beretta Holding Sends Letter to Ruger Shareholders Highlighting the Urgent Need for Boardroom Change at Ruger
feed.summary: Beretta Holding, the largest shareholder of Sturm, Ruger & Company with 9.95% ownership, has sent a letter to Ruger shareholders urging boardroom change. The letter cites sustained share price underperformance, rapid operational deterioration Marked by significant margin compression and net income decline, and a lack of alignment due to long-tenured directors holding minimal stock. Beretta Holding is nominating four independent director candidates for the upcoming 2026 Annual Meeting to restore value for all shareholders.

feed.title: News Corp reiterates $1B repurchase program; bought ~$128.9M of stock through March 19, 2026
feed.summary: News Corp has reiterated its $1 billion 2025 Repurchase Program, under which it has already purchased approximately $128.9 million in Class A and B shares through March 19, 2026. The repurchases are conducted with Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC and aim to enhance shareholder value, subject to market conditions. The company made significant purchases on March 19, 2026, across multiple tranches.

feed.title: Mirova Decreases Stake in Eli Lilly and Company $LLY
feed.summary: Mirova has significantly reduced its stake in Eli Lilly and Company by 23.3% in the third quarter, selling 6,722 shares, though LLY remains its 10th-largest holding. Despite this decrease, Wall Street analysts largely maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus on the stock, projecting a target price of approximately $1,221.44. The drug manufacturer shows strong potential with promising Phase 3 retatrutide results and substantial manufacturing investments, yet faces challenges from pricing pressures and increased competition, notably from Novo Nordisk's new higher-dose Wegovy.

feed.title: GAMMA Investing LLC Purchases 14,684 Shares of Exxon Mobil Corporation $XOM
feed.summary: GAMMA Investing LLC increased its stake in Exxon Mobil Corporation by 16.2% in the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 14,684 shares to bring its total holding to 105,595 shares valued at approximately $12.71 million. This makes Exxon Mobil their 21st-largest holding. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations, and announced a quarterly dividend, despite some insider selling activity.

feed.title: Darden leaders share strategy behind LongHorn Steakhouse's 7.2% sales surge
feed.summary: Darden Restaurants executives are attributing LongHorn Steakhouse's 7.2% same-store sales growth to a long-term strategy focused on quality and culture. This success comes despite increasing operating costs and pressures in the casual dining industry. LongHorn Steakhouse currently operates over 500 locations.

feed.title: Mirabella Financial Services LLP Invests $1.74M in Rollins, Inc.
feed.summary: Mirabella Financial Services LLP has invested $1.74 million in Rollins, Inc. (NYSE:ROL), a pest control services provider, by purchasing 29,657 shares during the third quarter. This investment signifies the hedge fund's belief in the growth potential of Rollins' business and stock performance. The move highlights continued institutional investor interest in the pest control industry, which is viewed as an attractive sector for growth and stability.
